title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Dalmia Bharat - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Dalmia Bharat - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Dalmia Bharat are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dalmia Bharat:
Dalmia Bharat is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dalmia Bharat!
